result.finding: Web Application with REST API. The application uses Spring MVC with Thymeleaf for server-side rendered UI (owner, pet, visit management) and also exposes a REST API endpoint (vets list as JSON).
evidence: spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf dependency indicates server-side rendered UI
spring-boot-starter-web dependency indicates HTTP web layer
OwnerController, PetController, VisitController serve HTML views
VetController serves both HTML view and JSON REST response
